title: New funding to build towards AGI
titleZh: 为通用人工智能（ AGI ）提供新资金
summary: Today we’re announcing new funding—$40B at a $300B post-money valuation, which enables us to push the frontiers of AI research even further, scale our compute infrastructure, and deliver increasingly powerful tools for the 500 million people who use ChatGPT every week.
summaryZh: 今天，我们宣布以3000亿美元的资金后估值获得400亿美元的新资金，这使我们能够进一步推动人工智能研究的前沿，扩展我们的计算基础设施，并为每周使用ChatGPT的5亿人提供越来越强大的工具。
highlights: Today we’re announcing new funding—$40B at a $300B post-money valuation, which enables us to push the frontiers of AI research even further, scale our compute infrastructure, and d
highlightsZh: 今天，我们宣布以3000亿美元的资金后估值获得400亿美元的新资金，这使我们能够进一步推动人工智能研究的前沿，扩展我们的计算基础设施，并为每周使用ChatGPT的5亿人提供越来越强大的工具。

title: Introducing 4o Image Generation
titleZh: 40°图像生成简介
summary: At OpenAI, we have long believed image generation should be a primary capability of our language models. That’s why we’ve built our most advanced image generator yet into GPT‑4o. The result—image generation that is not only beautiful, but useful.
summaryZh: 在OpenAI ，我们一直认为图像生成应该是我们语言模型的主要功能。这就是为什么我们在GPT-4o中构建了迄今为止最先进的图像生成器。结果图像生成不仅美观，而且有用。
highlights: At OpenAI, we have long believed image generation should be a primary capability of our language models.
That’s why we’ve built our most advanced image generator yet into GPT‑4o.
highlightsZh: 在OpenAI ，我们一直认为图像生成应该是我们语言模型的主要功能。这就是为什么我们在GPT-4o中构建了迄今为止最先进的图像生成器。结果图像生成不仅美观，而且有用。
originalContentWarning: 该条资讯暂未抓取正文快照，当前保留了标题、摘要和原文链接。

title: Addendum to GPT-4o System Card: 4o image generation
titleZh: GPT-4o系统卡附录： 40o图像生成
summary: 4o image generation is a new, significantly more capable image generation approach than our earlier DALL·E 3 series of models. It can create photorealistic output. It can take images as inputs and transform them.
summaryZh: 与我们早期的DALL · E 3系列模型相比， 4o图像生成是一种新的、功能更强大的图像生成方法。它可以创建逼真的输出。它可以将图像作为输入并进行转换。
highlights: 4o image generation is a new, significantly more capable image generation approach than our earlier DALL·E 3 series of models.
It can create photorealistic output.
highlightsZh: 与我们早期的DALL · E 3系列模型相比， 4o图像生成是一种新的、功能更强大的图像生成方法。它可以创建逼真的输出。它可以将图像作为输入并进行转换。

title: Leadership updates
titleZh: 领导层最新动态
summary: OpenAI has grown a lot. We remain focused on the same core—pursuing frontier AI research that accelerates human progress–but we now also deliver products used by hundreds of millions of people.

title: Detecting misbehavior in frontier reasoning models
titleZh: 检测前沿推理模型中的不当行为
summary: Frontier reasoning models exploit loopholes when given the chance. We show we can detect exploits using an LLM to monitor their chains-of-thought. Penalizing their “bad thoughts” doesn’t stop the majority of misbehavior—it makes them hide their intent.
summaryZh: 前沿推理模型在有机会时会利用漏洞。我们表明，我们可以使用LLM来检测漏洞利用，以监控他们的思维链。惩罚他们的「不良想法」并不能阻止大多数不当行为，这会让他们隐藏自己的意图。
highlights: Frontier reasoning models exploit loopholes when given the chance.
We show we can detect exploits using an LLM to monitor their chains-of-thought.
highlightsZh: 前沿推理模型在有机会时会利用漏洞。我们表明，我们可以使用LLM来检测漏洞利用，以监控他们的思维链。惩罚他们的「不良想法」并不能阻止大多数不当行为，这会让他们隐藏自己的意图。
originalContentWarning: 该条资讯暂未抓取正文快照，当前保留了标题、摘要和原文链接。
